title: Cryless Visuals
description: A simple client side mod that brings new visuals feedback and cosmetic options to make your gameplay feel more immersive
body:
Cryless Visuals is a client-side Minecraft mod designed to enhance your gameplay experience through visual improvements and combat UI features.

Developed by a 14 year old coder, this mod focuses on clean, customizable visual enhancements that make PvP and general gameplay more informative and immersive.

🔧 Features

* Hurt camera effects
* Ambient visual improvements
* Hit HUD showing enemy distance and health on a mini interface
* Fully customizable modules (enable/disable individually)

All modules can be toggled on or off and adjusted to fit your playstyle.

The mod is actively developing and will continue to improve with new features and optimizations over time.
